nodes.label: Multi-algorithm training (MODEL_REGISTRY: baseline/xgboost/random_forest)
nodes.rationale: Ensembling via predict_ensemble() is deferred until an algorithm actually beats baseline's Brier score in /models; until then a single model is simpler and just as good.

nodes.label: Provider-agnostic ingestion architecture
nodes.rationale: matches.py/odds.py/stats.py only consume normalized DTOs, never a provider's raw JSON shape, so providers are swappable via .env and new providers register in registry.py without touching ingestion consumers.

nodes.label: Read-only FastAPI+Jinja2+HTMX dashboard (web/)
nodes.rationale: web/ is read-only, GET-only, zero mutation, and depends on footy only as a library so it can't affect bot behavior.

nodes.label: Production deployment (VPS via Hostinger MCP)
nodes.rationale: Hostinger MCP's VPS_createNewProjectV1 deploy path does not honor env_file:, only an inline environment: block, so secrets must be passed as literal values in that call rather than a .env on the VPS.

nodes.label: Compliance: paper/backtest only, no real-money execution
nodes.rationale: No real-money execution; rationale documented in betting/ code comments.
nodes.norm_label: compliance: paper/backtest only, no real-money execution

links.source_location: published by .github/workflows/docker-publish.yml on every push to main
published by .github/workflows/docker-publish.yml on every push to main
Local: docker compose up -d then open http://localhost:8000
Production: deployed alongside app/db, routed by Traefik
route table: / shows Match/prediction counts, synced leagues
route table: /models shows Brier/log-loss/accuracy per league/algorithm
route table: /predictions shows upcoming SCHEDULED matches filterable by league

hyperedges.label: Production docker-compose stack (db, app, web) behind Traefik
